text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There isn't much time left until the Japan Dirt
Derby. Meanwhile, I've put Inari One down for
the Takarazuka Kinen to build some experience in
the bigger races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But we have competition. There's a runner who's
been sweeping up wins at an incredible rate,
taking the public by storm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This showdown is bound to fuel Inari One's
passion!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wow! That name packs a real punch! I'm jealous!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know that! They say she's close to bein' the
best, so I plan to confirm that for myself!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whoa... The air here feels so... heavy.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(I've never experienced anythin' like this before!
Don't tell me...)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Tamamo Cross may be a pip-squeak, but she's
got a good pair of legs and one heck of a fightin'
spirit. I've known this for the longest time, but...)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(The heck! I wasn't expectin' this! She's nothin'
like this back at school! Her whole body's
practically explodin' with energy!)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Inari. I'm on my journey to become the top racer
in all of Japan.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If ya don't take me on ready for a fight, you'll
walk away from this with more than a burn...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Fight me, Tama! We'll see who gets burned in the
end!
